output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Demand It Back in 60 Seconds
output.meta_description: Landlord withholding your deposit? Know your rights and send a legal demand letter in 60 seconds for $19.99. No sign-up required.
content_outline: Why Landlords Wrongfully Withhold Security Deposits (And Why Most Deductions Are Illegal)
Tenant Rights 101: Return Timelines, Itemized Deductions, and State Laws
The Power of a Demand Letter: Your Fastest Path to Getting Deposits Back
How Deposits-Back.com Works: Generate Your Letter in 60 Seconds for $19.99—No Sign-Up
key_points: Most U.S. states require landlords to return security deposits within 14 to 60 days and provide an itemized list of any deductions.
Landlords cannot legally deduct for normal wear and tear, unpaid rent without proof, or vague 'cleaning' charges without receipts.
A formal demand letter is the single most effective pre-court step to force compliance and show you know your tenant rights.
Deposits-Back.com lets frustrated tenants create a professional, legally sound demand letter in under 60 seconds for a flat $19.99—no subscription, no sign-up.
output.cta: Stop waiting and start demanding. Visit Deposits-Back.com now to generate your deposit return letter for $19.99. It takes 60 seconds, and you never need to sign up or subscribe.
output.target_audience: Frustrated U.S. renters whose landlord is withholding, delaying, or wrongfully deducting from their security deposit and who need fast, affordable help without hiring an attorney.
